_comment: Copy the relevant sections to your ~/.claude/settings.json

hooks._comment: Option 1: Just add reminder to run /reflect
Option 2: Auto-reflect — queues the transcript so the *next* SessionStart agent runs /reflect on it. Requires the SessionStart drain hook below.

_PreCompact_full._comment: Option 3: Handover + backup + auto-reflect. CRITICAL: each command MUST be a separate hooks-array entry, NOT chained with &&. Hook stdin is consumed by the first reader, so chained commands silently lose the JSON event payload (only the last command sees stdin in a shell pipeline).

SessionStart._comment: Drain hook for Option 2/3 above: surfaces queued auto-reflections to the new agent via additionalContext, so the agent (which IS an LLM) can run /reflect on each transcript. Exits silently when the queue is empty.
